# isAVBSupported()

**Type Method**

Returns a Boolean value that indicates whether the current machine hardware supports Audio Video Bridging (AVB).

## Declaration

```swift
class func isAVBSupported() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the hardware supports AVB; otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].
title: isAVBSupported()
